title: platystele ingramii
intro: Platystele ingramii is a species of orchid, specifically a terrestrial orchid, native to Central America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, where its leaves and roots have been employed for their medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Platystele ingramii are reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
